NAME: BBJ — Quantitative traits GWAS
DESCRIPTION: Large-scale GWAS of 58 quantitative traits in up to 148,000 Japanese individuals. Identified 585 trait-associated loci, 118 of which were novel. Demonstrated cell-type-specific gene expression mediation and genetic correlations between Japanese and European populations.
TITLE: Genetic analysis of quantitative traits in the Japanese population links cell types to complex human diseases
